---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>

<style>
  .svc-hero{background:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);color:#fff;padding:2.5rem 2rem;}
  .svc-hero h1{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:2.2rem;margin:0 0 .4rem;}
  .svc-hero p{opacity:.7;margin:0;font-size:1rem;}
  .svc-wrap{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.5rem 1.5rem 3rem;}
  .svc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.25rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;}
  .svc-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e0ddd6);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem;box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);}
  .svc-card h3{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;margin:0 0 1rem;color:var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);}
  .svc-full{grid-column:1/-1;}
  .svc-heatgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:.5rem;}
  .svc-tile{padding:.75rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:500;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
  .svc-tile:hover{transform:translateX(4px);box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
  .svc-tile.active{outline:2px solid var(--map-navy,#3d3d3d);outline-offset:1px;}
  .svc-tile .svc-name{flex:1;}
  .svc-tile .svc-pct{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;white-space:nowrap;margin-left:.5rem;}
  .svc-tile .svc-count{font-size:.75rem;opacity:.7;margin-left:.25rem;}
  .svc-status{padding:.75rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:1rem;background:rgba(201,162,39,.06);border-left:4px solid var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  #svc-map{width:100%;height:450px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e0ddd6);z-index:1;}
  .svc-legend{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:.75rem;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--map-text-muted);}
  .svc-legend-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;}
  .svc-legend-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;}
  .svc-detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:.5rem;max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;}
  .svc-detail-item{padding:.5rem .75rem;background:var(--map-bg-section,#f5f4f0);border-radius:6px;font-size:.82rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
  .svc-detail-item .cnt{font-weight:700;color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .svc-topbar{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;}
  .svc-metric{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--map-border,#e0ddd6);border-radius:8px;padding:1rem;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--map-shadow);}
  .svc-metric .val{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .svc-metric .lbl{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--map-text-muted,#6b6b6b);margin-top:.15rem;}
  .svc-country-btn{padding:.5rem 1.25rem;border-radius:6px;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;border:2px solid var(--map-border,#e0ddd6);background:#fff;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
  .svc-country-btn.active{background:var(--map-red,#c9a227);color:#fff;border-color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  .svc-country-btn:hover:not(.active){border-color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);color:var(--map-red,#c9a227);}
  canvas{max-height:300px!important;}
  @media(max-width:768px){.svc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} #svc-map{height:350px;}}
</style>

<section class="svc-hero">
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">
    <h1>Service Gap Intelligence</h1>
    <p>Facility-level service data across Tanzania, Kenya, Zambia, Malawi and Botswana &mdash; identifying coverage gaps and service deserts across countries</p>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="svc-wrap">

  <!-- Country selector -->
  <div style="display:flex;gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:1rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <span style="font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--map-text-muted);">Country:</span>
    <button class="svc-country-btn active" onclick="window._switchCountry('tanzania')" id="btn-tanzania">Tanzania</button>
    <button class="svc-country-btn" onclick="window._switchCountry('kenya')" id="btn-kenya">Kenya</button>
    <button class="svc-country-btn" onclick="window._switchCountry('zambia')" id="btn-zambia">Zambia</button>
    <button class="svc-country-btn" onclick="window._switchCountry('malawi')" id="btn-malawi">Malawi</button>
    <button class="svc-country-btn" onclick="window._switchCountry('botswana')" id="btn-botswana">Botswana</button>
  </div>

  <div class="svc-status" id="svc-status">Loading data...</div>

  <div class="svc-topbar" id="svc-topbar"></div>

  <div class="svc-card svc-full" style="margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
    <h3>Service Category Coverage <span style="font-weight:400;font-size:.85rem;color:var(--map-text-muted);">&mdash; click a category to explore</span></h3>
    <div class="svc-heatgrid" id="svc-heatgrid"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="svc-grid">
    <div class="svc-card">
      <h3>Coverage Rate by Category</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-svc"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="svc-card">
      <h3 id="map-title">Map</h3>
      <div id="svc-map"></div>
      <div class="svc-legend">
        <div class="svc-legend-item"><div class="svc-legend-dot" style="background:#5a8a5a;"></div> Has Service</div>
        <div class="svc-legend-item"><div class="svc-legend-dot" style="background:#d45050;"></div> No Service</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="svc-card svc-full" style="margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
    <h3 id="detail-title">Specific Services</h3>
    <div class="svc-detail-grid" id="svc-detail-grid"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="svc-grid">
    <div class="svc-card">
      <h3 id="region-chart-title">Regional Coverage</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-region" style="max-height:380px!important;"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="svc-card">
      <h3>Facility Type Distribution</h3>
      <canvas id="chart-types"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
(function(){
  // Country configurations
  // ETL_BASE: per-country ETL outputs published by the
  // health_facility_etl pipeline (git submodule at etl/).
  var ETL_BASE = 'etl/data/processed/country_standardized';
  var COUNTRIES = {
    tanzania: {
      facFile: ETL_BASE + '/tanzania_standardized.csv',
      svcFile: ETL_BASE + '/tanzania_services_standardized.csv',
      bounds: [[-11.8,-1.0],[29.2,40.6]],
      label: 'Tanzania'
    },
    kenya: {
      facFile: ETL_BASE + '/kenya_standardized.csv',
      svcFile: ETL_BASE + '/kenya_services_standardized.csv',
      bounds: [[-4.7,5.5],[33.9,41.9]],
      label: 'Kenya'
    },
    zambia: {
      facFile: ETL_BASE + '/zambia_standardized.csv',
      svcFile: 'data/Zambia/zambia_services.csv',
      bounds: [[-18.1,-8.2],[21.9,33.7]],
      label: 'Zambia'
    },
    malawi: {
      facFile: ETL_BASE + '/malawi_standardized.csv',
      svcFile: ETL_BASE + '/malawi_services_standardized.csv',
      bounds: [[-17.2,-9.3],[32.6,36.0]],
      label: 'Malawi'
    },
    botswana: {
      facFile: ETL_BASE + '/botswana_standardized.csv',
      svcFile: ETL_BASE + '/botswana_services_standardized.csv',
      bounds: [[-26.9,-17.7],[20.0,29.4]],
      label: 'Botswana'
    }
  };

  var currentCountry = 'tanzania';
  var facilities = {};
  var svcByCode = {};
  var svcCodes = new Set();
  var selectedCat = '';
  var map, markers = [];
  var chartSvc, chartRegion, chartTypes;
  var cache = {}; // {country: {facilities, svcByCode, svcCodes}}

  function colorGrad(pct){
    if(pct>=70) return '#5a8a5a';
    if(pct>=40) return '#c9a227';
    if(pct>=15) return '#d48a27';
    return '#d45050';
  }

  function setStatus(msg){ document.getElementById('svc-status').innerHTML = msg; }

  map = L.map('svc-map').setView([-2,35],5);
  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png',{
    attribution:'&copy; OSM &copy; CARTO', maxZoom:18
  }).addTo(map);

  // ── Load a country ──
  function loadCountry(key){
    // Update button states
    document.querySelectorAll('.svc-country-btn').forEach(function(b){ b.classList.remove('active'); });
    document.getElementById('btn-'+key).classList.add('active');
    currentCountry = key;

    // Check cache
    if(cache[key]){
      facilities = cache[key].facilities;
      svcByCode = cache[key].svcByCode;
      svcCodes = cache[key].svcCodes;
      selectedCat = '';
      onReady();
      return;
    }

    facilities = {};
    svcByCode = {};
    svcCodes = new Set();
    selectedCat = '';
    var cfg = COUNTRIES[key];
    var loaded = {fac:false, svc:false};

    setStatus('Loading ' + cfg.label + ' facilities...');

    Papa.parse(cfg.facFile,{
      download:true, header:true, skipEmptyLines:true,
      complete:function(res){
        var b = cfg.bounds;
        res.data.forEach(function(r){
          if(!r.facility_code || !r.facility_name || r.facility_name==='facility_name') return;
          var la=parseFloat(r.latitude), lo=parseFloat(r.longitude);
          if(!isNaN(la)&&!isNaN(lo)&&(la<b[0][0]||la>b[0][1]||lo<b[1][0]||lo>b[1][1])){
            r.latitude=''; r.longitude='';
          }
          facilities[r.facility_code] = r;
        });
        loaded.fac=true;
        setStatus('Loaded '+Object.keys(facilities).length+' facilities. Loading services...');
        if(loaded.svc) finishLoad(key);
      },
      error:function(){ setStatus('Failed to load facility data.'); }
    });

    Papa.parse(cfg.svcFile,{
      download:true, header:true, skipEmptyLines:true,
      complete:function(res){
        res.data.forEach(function(r){
          if(!r.facility_code || r.facility_code==='facility_code') return;
          // ETL flag — skip equipment, commodities, training records, etc.
          if(r.include_in_analysis === 'FALSE') return;
          // ETL schema: service_domain > service_group > service_name
          // Legacy: service_category / service_detail
          var cat = r.service_domain || r.service_category || r.service_group || '';
          if(!cat) return;
          if(cfg.categoryFilter && cfg.categoryFilter.indexOf(cat) < 0) return;
          var detail = r.service_name || r.service_detail || r.service_group || '';
          svcCodes.add(r.facility_code);
          if(!svcByCode[r.facility_code]) svcByCode[r.facility_code]={};
          if(!svcByCode[r.facility_code][cat]) svcByCode[r.facility_code][cat]=[];
          svcByCode[r.facility_code][cat].push(detail);
        });
        loaded.svc=true;
        if(loaded.fac) finishLoad(key);
      },
      error:function(){ setStatus('Failed to load service data.'); }
    });
  }

  function finishLoad(key){
    cache[key] = {facilities:facilities, svcByCode:svcByCode, svcCodes:svcCodes};
    onReady();
  }

  // ── Render everything ──
  function onReady(){
    var totalFac = Object.keys(facilities).length;
    var totalSvc = svcCodes.size;
    var totalRecords = 0;
    Object.values(svcByCode).forEach(function(cats){
      Object.values(cats).forEach(function(arr){ totalRecords += arr.length; });
    });

    // Discover all categories from the data
    var catSet = new Set();
    Object.values(svcByCode).forEach(function(cats){ Object.keys(cats).forEach(function(c){ catSet.add(c); }); });
    var allCats = Array.from(catSet).sort();

    // Auto-select first category
    if(!selectedCat || !catSet.has(selectedCat)){
      selectedCat = allCats[0] || '';
    }

    setStatus('<strong>'+COUNTRIES[currentCountry].label+':</strong> '+totalFac.toLocaleString()+' facilities, '+totalSvc.toLocaleString()+' with service data ('+totalRecords.toLocaleString()+' records)');

    renderTopbar(totalFac, totalSvc, totalRecords, allCats.length);
    renderHeatgrid(allCats);
    renderCoverageChart(allCats);
    renderMap(selectedCat);
    renderDetails(selectedCat);
    renderRegionChart(selectedCat);
    renderTypeChart();
    updateTitles();
  }

  function updateTitles(){
    var catLabel = selectedCat.length > 40 ? selectedCat.substring(0,40)+'...' : selectedCat;
    document.getElementById('map-title').innerHTML = 'Map: ' + catLabel;
    document.getElementById('detail-title').innerHTML = 'Specific Services: ' + catLabel;
    document.getElementById('region-chart-title').innerHTML = 'Regional Coverage: ' + catLabel;
  }

  function renderTopbar(totalFac, totalSvc, totalRecords, catCount){
    var covPct = totalFac > 0 ? Math.round(totalSvc / totalFac * 100) : 0;
    var regionSet = new Set();
    Object.values(facilities).forEach(function(f){ if(f.admin1 && f.admin1!=='admin1') regionSet.add(f.admin1); });
    document.getElementById('svc-topbar').innerHTML =
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">'+totalFac.toLocaleString()+'</div><div class="lbl">Total Facilities</div></div>'+
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">'+totalSvc.toLocaleString()+'</div><div class="lbl">With Service Data</div></div>'+
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">'+covPct+'%</div><div class="lbl">Service Coverage</div></div>'+
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">'+totalRecords.toLocaleString()+'</div><div class="lbl">Service Records</div></div>'+
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">'+catCount+'</div><div class="lbl">Service Categories</div></div>'+
      '<div class="svc-metric"><div class="val">'+regionSet.size+'</div><div class="lbl">Regions / Counties</div></div>';
  }

  function renderHeatgrid(allCats){
    var totalWithSvc = svcCodes.size || 1;
    var html = '';
    allCats.forEach(function(cat){
      var count = 0;
      Object.keys(svcByCode).forEach(function(code){ if(svcByCode[code][cat]) count++; });
      var pct = Math.round(count / totalWithSvc * 100);
      var bg = colorGrad(pct);
      var active = cat === selectedCat ? ' active' : '';
      var label = cat.length > 35 ? cat.substring(0,35)+'...' : cat;
      html += '<div class="svc-tile'+active+'" style="background:'+bg+'15;border-left:3px solid '+bg+';" onclick="window._selectCat(\''+cat.replace(/'/g,"\\'")+'\')">' +
        '<span class="svc-name">'+label+'</span>' +
        '<span class="svc-pct" style="color:'+bg+';">'+pct+'%</span>' +
        '<span class="svc-count" style="color:'+bg+';">('+count.toLocaleString()+')</span></div>';
    });
    document.getElementById('svc-heatgrid').innerHTML = html;
  }

  window._selectCat = function(cat){
    selectedCat = cat;
    // Rebuild categories list from cache
    var catSet = new Set();
    Object.values(svcByCode).forEach(function(cats){ Object.keys(cats).forEach(function(c){ catSet.add(c); }); });
    renderHeatgrid(Array.from(catSet).sort());
    renderMap(cat);
    renderDetails(cat);
    renderRegionChart(cat);
    updateTitles();
  };

  window._switchCountry = function(key){
    if(key === currentCountry) return;
    loadCountry(key);
  };

  function renderCoverageChart(allCats){
    var totalWithSvc = svcCodes.size || 1;
    var labels=[], values=[], colors=[];
    // Show top 15 categories by coverage
    var catData = allCats.map(function(cat){
      var count=0;
      Object.keys(svcByCode).forEach(function(code){ if(svcByCode[code][cat]) count++; });
      return {cat:cat, count:count, pct:Math.round(count/totalWithSvc*100)};
    }).sort(function(a,b){return b.count-a.count;}).slice(0,15);

    catData.forEach(function(d){
      var label = d.cat.length > 30 ? d.cat.substring(0,30)+'...' : d.cat;
      labels.push(label);
      values.push(d.pct);
      colors.push(colorGrad(d.pct));
    });
    if(chartSvc) chartSvc.destroy();
    chartSvc = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-svc'),{
      type:'bar',
      data:{labels:labels, datasets:[{label:'Coverage %',data:values,backgroundColor:colors,borderRadius:4}]},
      options:{indexAxis:'y',responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},
        scales:{x:{max:100,grid:{display:false},ticks:{callback:function(v){return v+'%';}}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:10}}}}}
    });
  }

  function renderMap(cat){
    markers.forEach(function(m){map.removeLayer(m);});
    markers = [];
    var cfg = COUNTRIES[currentCountry];
    var codes = Object.keys(svcByCode);
    var step = codes.length > 5000 ? Math.ceil(codes.length/5000) : 1;

    codes.forEach(function(code, i){
      if(i % step !== 0) return;
      var f = facilities[code];
      if(!f) return;
      var lat=parseFloat(f.latitude), lon=parseFloat(f.longitude);
      if(isNaN(lat)||isNaN(lon)) return;
      // Bounds check
      if(lat<cfg.bounds[0][0]||lat>cfg.bounds[0][1]||lon<cfg.bounds[1][0]||lon>cfg.bounds[1][1]) return;

      var hasSvc = svcByCode[code][cat] && svcByCode[code][cat].length > 0;
      var color = hasSvc ? '#5a8a5a' : '#d45050';

      var m = L.circleMarker([lat,lon],{
        radius:4, color:color, weight:1, opacity:0.7,
        fillColor:color, fillOpacity:0.5
      }).addTo(map);

      var details = '';
      if(hasSvc){
        details = '<br/><strong style="color:#5a8a5a;">Services:</strong><br/>' +
          svcByCode[code][cat].slice(0,5).map(function(d){return '&bull; '+d;}).join('<br/>');
        if(svcByCode[code][cat].length > 5) details += '<br/><em>+'+(svcByCode[code][cat].length-5)+' more</em>';
      }
      m.bindPopup('<strong>'+f.facility_name+'</strong><br/><span style="color:#6b6b6b;">'+(f.facility_type||'')+' &bull; '+(f.ownership||f.facility_ownership||'')+'</span><br/><span style="color:#6b6b6b;">'+(f.admin1||'')+'</span>'+details);
      markers.push(m);
    });

    map.fitBounds([[cfg.bounds[0][0],cfg.bounds[1][0]],[cfg.bounds[0][1],cfg.bounds[1][1]]],{padding:[10,10]});
  }

  function renderDetails(cat){
    var detailCounts = {};
    Object.values(svcByCode).forEach(function(cats){
      if(!cats[cat]) return;
      cats[cat].forEach(function(d){ detailCounts[d]=(detailCounts[d]||0)+1; });
    });
    var entries = Object.entries(detailCounts).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];});
    var html = '';
    entries.forEach(function(e){
      html += '<div class="svc-detail-item"><span>'+e[0]+'</span><span class="cnt">'+e[1].toLocaleString()+'</span></div>';
    });
    if(!entries.length) html = '<div style="color:var(--map-text-muted);padding:1rem;">No service details for this category.</div>';
    document.getElementById('svc-detail-grid').innerHTML = html;
  }

  function renderRegionChart(cat){
    var regionTotal={}, regionHas={};
    Object.keys(facilities).forEach(function(code){
      var f=facilities[code];
      var region=f.admin1||'Unknown';
      if(region==='admin1'||region==='NA') return;
      regionTotal[region]=(regionTotal[region]||0)+1;
      if(svcByCode[code]&&svcByCode[code][cat]) regionHas[region]=(regionHas[region]||0)+1;
    });
    var entries = Object.keys(regionTotal).map(function(r){
      return {region:r, total:regionTotal[r], has:regionHas[r]||0};
    }).sort(function(a,b){return b.has-a.has;}).slice(0,20);

    if(chartRegion) chartRegion.destroy();
    chartRegion = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-region'),{
      type:'bar',
      data:{
        labels:entries.map(function(e){return e.region;}),
        datasets:[
          {label:'Has Service',data:entries.map(function(e){return e.has;}),backgroundColor:'#5a8a5a',borderRadius:4},
          {label:'No Service',data:entries.map(function(e){return e.total-e.has;}),backgroundColor:'#d4503033',borderRadius:4}
        ]
      },
      options:{indexAxis:'y',responsive:true,
        plugins:{legend:{position:'top',labels:{boxWidth:12,font:{size:11}}}},
        scales:{x:{stacked:true,grid:{display:false}},y:{stacked:true,grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:10}}}}}
    });
  }

  function renderTypeChart(){
    var types={};
    Object.values(facilities).forEach(function(f){
      var t=f.facility_type||'Unknown';
      if(t==='facility_type') return;
      types[t]=(types[t]||0)+1;
    });
    var entries = Object.entries(types).sort(function(a,b){return b[1]-a[1];}).slice(0,10);
    var COLORS = ['#c9a227','#5a7a9b','#5a8a5a','#d48a27','#8b5cf6','#5a9a8a','#6b6b6b','#d45050','#e05930','#3d3d3d'];
    if(chartTypes) chartTypes.destroy();
    chartTypes = new Chart(document.getElementById('chart-types'),{
      type:'doughnut',
      data:{labels:entries.map(function(e){return e[0];}),datasets:[{data:entries.map(function(e){return e[1];}),backgroundColor:COLORS,borderWidth:0}]},
      options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{position:'right',labels:{boxWidth:12,font:{size:11}}}}}
    });
  }

  // ── Init: load Tanzania by default ──
  loadCountry('tanzania');
})();
</script>
```
